title: Mountain and Water Landscape
description: Mountains, valleys, coastlines, and the slow places between. Long looks at land that isn't waiting for me.

images.alt: A mountain road bending out of frame, with an alpenglow-lit peak rising above forested ridges at last light
images.caption: Karpenisi, Greece — last light

images.alt: An 18th-century stone arch bridge over a still mountain stream, with reflection forming a perfect almond shape
images.caption: Kalogeriko bridge, Zagori

alt: Granite peaks rising from the sea above a small fishing village in low Arctic light
Wide coastal view with serrated mountains catching warm side-light against deep blue water
images.caption: Lofoten, Norway

images.alt: A traditional wooden cabin on a green hillside, with snow-capped Slovenian Alps and broken cloud light behind
images.caption: Logar Valley, Slovenia
